---
title: ""
author: ""
format: 
    html:
        code-fold: false
        code-tools: false
        toc: true
        toc-location: left
        toc-depth: 6
        code-overflow: wrap
        code-copy: hover
        self-contained: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
  echo: true
  eval: true
---
